task_updates.executor_notes: Added resolver request/context/result contracts and a `TaskInsertObject` shape that includes the current tasks insert columns plus nullable `idempotency_key` from the applied migration.

Extended task-creation response parsing for single and batch payloads, preserved `meta`, and updated placeholder ID extraction to accept `{ task_ids }` shapes. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`; direct targeted vitest execution was blocked by the workspace alias-resolution issue noted above.

Moved the shared image-generation request types into `src/shared/types/imageGeneration.ts`, updated the requested consumers, and left the family module re-exporting those types so unchanged callers still compile. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Moved `IndividualTravelSegmentParams` into `src/shared/types/individualTravelSegment.ts`, switched both direct importers to the shared module, and preserved the family re-export surface. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Moved the public join-clips task-input types into `src/shared/types/joinClips.ts`, re-exported them from the family module, and typed the three listed callers against the shared contract. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `TaskInsertObject` now models the tasks insert payload with the expected task columns and includes nullable `idempotency_key`, matching the migration-backed schema used by create-task.

Single responses still parse from `task_id`; batch responses parse from `task_ids`, preserve `meta`, and keep `task_id` populated with the first batch id for compatibility with existing single-task consumers.
The relocated image-generation shared types compiled cleanly under `npx tsc --noEmit`, and the family module continues re-exporting them for remaining callers.
Both `submitSegmentTask.ts` and `segmentSettingsUtils.ts` resolve the new shared segment type path correctly; `npx tsc --noEmit` passed after the move.

All public join-clips exports covered by the task (`JoinClipDescriptor`, `CanonicalJoinClipsTaskInput`, `JoinClipsClipSource`, `JoinClipsVideoEditConfig`) were relocated into the shared module and re-exported from the family index.
